title: malanea macrophylla var. megalantha
intro: Malanea macrophylla var. megalantha is a plant species in the Malpighiaceae family, commonly known as the Malanena or Giant Malanena. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Malanea macrophylla var. megalantha include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and its leaves can be dried and made into a tea.
